creator: st.witzel@web.de
text:
Hello,
 
 I have a similar problem installing FreeBSD 7.0
 
 Environment:
 Mainboard: ASUS M2R-FVM
 BIOS: Phoenix
 Chipset: ATI RS482
 Processor: AMD Athlon 64 X2 4000+
 Keyboard/Mouse: USB, no PS2 interface
 
 When I enable USB legacy support at boot screen the keyboard works, but th=
 e system panics with
      ohci=5Fadd=5Fdone addr 000d1690 not found
 
 When I disable USB legacy support at boot screen the keyboard don't work, =
 but I can successfully install the OS.
 
 I also have Debian installed on the disk (installed with legacy support en=
 abled). Grub doesn't work with usb
 legacy support disabled, FBSD panics with legacy support disabled. How to =
 run my favorite OS=3F
 
 Thanks in advance.
 
 Stefan=20
 
 --=20
 --
 
 =5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F=5F
 Bis 50 MB Dateianh=E4nge=3F Kein Problem!
